data.description_suggestion: Refunds a previously captured payment. Requires the payment ID and refund details (amount and reason) in the request body. The refund amount must not exceed the originally captured amount. Returns the updated payment details reflecting the refund transaction. This operation transitions the payment state and creates a refund record in the system.

data.description_suggestion: Authenticates using OAuth 2.0 client credentials grant to obtain a Bearer token for API access. Requires client_id and client_secret in the request body. data.description_suggestion: Cancels a previously authorized payment, releasing the authorization hold and preventing any future capture. Returns a ManagementResponse confirming the cancellation status. The payment status transitions from authorized to cancelled. No refund is issued for cancelled payments. Requires the paymentId path parameter and Bearer token authentication.
